prompt: I have a validation plan in e2e-evidence/validation-plan.md with 5 journeys. Running forge-execute now. First attempt on 'user-signup' fails: form submits but no confirmation page. API returned 200 but frontend never navigates. Help me fix and re-validate.
expected_output: Directs user to: (1) read evidence from forge-attempt-1/user-signup/ (2) root cause: backend success but frontend redirect logic broken (3) fix: check navigation handler in signup component (4) rebuild (5) re-execute into forge-attempt-2/user-signup/. Increments strike count in state.
